stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
Given the following information, find the Index at TOM after the Last Minute Change (LMC) by using the balance sheet.

Actual TOM before LMC: 52000 kg
Index at Actual TOM before LMC: 50.0
LMC data: four passengers disembarked from seat row No. 3, and 500 kg of cargo loaded in the Cargo 1 compartment.
